positive: Minimalist celestial bear paw print constellation art, centered composition, featuring a stylized, abstract bear paw silhouette filled with interconnected bright white line-art stars and constellations, set against a deep indigo midnight blue background. Scattered small white nebulae wisps and glowing white crescent moon phases surround the central subject. The style should be modern, clean, and highly contrasting, evoking scientific diagram aesthetics mixed with ethereal glow. Perfect for screen printing on apparel, with crisp, clean lines and solid color blocks. High contrast, luminous glow effect, perfect symmetry, vector art aesthetic, elegant, detailed illustration.
